title: Unique Paths
hints: From any cell you can only move right or down — the path count is the sum of paths from the cell above and the cell to the left
The first row and first column each have exactly 1 path
Build a 2D table: dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j] + dp[i][j-1]
Space optimization: use a single row and update it left-to-right
